title: Round State
description: Schema for round.yaml — the metadata file for each research round.

round_id.description: Sequential round number within the project.

project_id.description: Must match the project_id in project.yaml.

round_type.description: The type of round. Determines which required_outputs are mandatory vs optional.

started_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the round was opened.

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the round was closed, or null if still open.

target_gap.description: Gap ID this round aims to close, or null for setup/finalization rounds.

required_outputs.description: List of required output identifiers for this round type.
